title: Ender Villages
description: I have added a new type of village with new villagers in the end with new trades new professions and new structures
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/087c07c667d2f43701f448b5b96f291705fefa9f.png)
## v3.0.0
- Fixed Pumpkin Eye Enchantment to actually fully work now
- Fixed bug where End Villagers Who turned into Zombie Villagers had no textures
- Fixed Endify Potion not Working on Cats
- Added End Armorer Villager
- Added End Tool Smith Villager
- Added End Tool Smith Table Block and Armorer Table Block
- Added End Axe , End Sword, End Shovel, End Pickaxe , End Hoe
- Added Pearl Helmet , Pearl Chestplate with Elytra, Pearl leggings , Pearl Boots
- While Wearing all Armor when you pearl you get bonus health and speed
- Added  Obsidian Breaker Enchantment(I/II/III) lets you break Obsidian/Crying Obsidian Much Faster can only get by Trading with Enchanter Villager
                                            
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/2YSQZSRXTUQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## Last Major Update v2.4
- -Changed the Brewing Structure to hold the End Brewing Stand Instead of Brewing Stand
- -Fixed Farm Spawning in the Ground
- -Fixed File Layout
- -Fixed Nbt Spawns For Villagers
- -Fixed Iron Golems Spawning in village and Replaced with Ender Golem
- -Fixed Ender Cat displaying the wrong name
- -Added End NitWit Profession
- -Added being able to summon End NitWit using Commands 
- -Added Ender Golem
- -Added Ender Golem Spawn Egg
- -Added Being able to summon Ender Golem if enough villagers are near each other
- -Added Lily of The End Flower on death of Ender Golem
- -Added Potion/Splash Potion/Lingering Potion of Teleport I/II (Randomly teleports entity 50/100 blocks)
- -Added Potion/Splash Potion/Lingering Potion of Endify I (transforms Villagers or Iron Golems to their End Versions)
- -Added Potion/Splash Potion/Lingering Potion of Freeze I/II/III (Will Freeze entity 7sec/13sec/17sec)
- -Added New Ender Brewing Profession (Will Trade you the new Potions as they are not brewable)
- -Added New End Brewing Stand Block (Gives the End Brewing Profession)
- -Added being able to craft the End Brewing Stand out of the Lily of The End Flower
